chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.468 of 2023 HCA No.08 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge HCA No.468 of 2023 Hearing (Priority) Case 1. For orders on CMA No.5981/2023 (U/S 151 CPC). 2. For orders on CMA No.5982/2023 (Contempt). 3. For orders on CMA No.5984/2023 (U/S 151 CPC). 4. For orders on office objection. 5. For orders on CMA No.5943/2023 (Exemption). 6. For hearing of main case. 7. For hearing of CMA No.5944/2023 (Stay). HCA No.08 of 2024 Hearing (Priority) Case 1. For orders on office objections a/w reply at ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.19/2024 (Stay). 29.5.2024 Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Kalwar, Advocate for Appellants. Mr. Maaz Waheed, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. M. Asad Ashfaq Tola, Advocate for ECP. ************* Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Kalwar, learned counsel appearing for the Appellants, submits that since the suits out of which these appeals have arisen have been withdrawn, therefore, these appeals have become infructuous and as such on instructions he does not press these appeals. The appeals are dismissed as withdrawn alongwith pending applications. Office to place a copy of this order in the connected appeal. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
